metadata.name: minio-client
metadata.description: Command-line tool for managing S3-compatible object storage - builds from source via Go

default.description: Build from source via go install (recommended)
postInstall: echo 'MinIO Client installed to $GOPATH/bin/mc (ensure $GOPATH/bin is in PATH)'

source.installScript: git clone https://github.com/minio/mc.git /tmp/mc-build && cd /tmp/mc-build && go build -o /usr/local/bin/mc . && rm -rf /tmp/mc-build

default.description: Build from source via go install (recommended)
postInstall: echo 'MinIO Client installed to $GOPATH/bin/mc (ensure $GOPATH/bin is in PATH)'

source.installScript: git clone https://github.com/minio/mc.git /tmp/mc-build && cd /tmp/mc-build && go build -o /usr/local/bin/mc . && rm -rf /tmp/mc-build

default.description: Build from source via go install (recommended)
postInstall: Write-Host 'MinIO Client installed to %GOPATH%\bin\mc.exe (ensure %GOPATH%\bin is in PATH)'

source.installScript: git clone https://github.com/minio/mc.git %TEMP%\mc-build && cd %TEMP%\mc-build && go build -o %GOPATH%\bin\mc.exe . && rd /s /q %TEMP%\mc-build

features: Build from source via go install
Compatible with AWS S3, MinIO, and other S3-compatible services

aiPrompts.versionDiscovery: Check https://github.com/minio/mc/releases for latest release tags (date-based: RELEASE.YYYY-MM-DDThh-mm-ssZ). MinIO Client is source-only, requires Go to build.
aiPrompts.urlResolution: Source: go install github.com/minio/mc@latest. Manual build: git clone https://github.com/minio/mc.git
aiPrompts.updateGuidance: MinIO Client uses rolling date-based releases. Default variant uses @latest which always gets the newest version. Note: mc binary may conflict with Midnight Commander on some Linux systems.
aiPrompts.binaryConflict: The mc binary name may conflict with Midnight Commander (mc) on Linux. Users should verify which mc is in their PATH after installation. MinIO Client can also be invoked as $GOPATH/bin/mc explicitly.
